title: RF-100 — ExecutionProof Governance Standard (v0.9 Draft)
description: RF-100 defines the minimum normative structure a high-consequence system (AI agent, automated workflow, financial execution system, infrastructure controller) must satisfy before a governed action executes. It specifies ten elements expressed as numbered RFC 2119 requirements, plus the RF-100:AI conformance profile for AI agents and autonomous systems. This is a public draft for review and critique; no certification program exists yet, and no claim of conformance is made. Published by Remnant Fieldworks Inc. under the Proof Before Power doctrine.
